summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TemaDom marketplace new features. All 10 feature requirements tested and verified working correctly. Backend tests: 20/20 passed (100%). Frontend tests: all critical flows working.
passed_tests: ✅ Logo displays correctly using user's exact PNG image (/logo-nav.png in navbar, /logo-footer.png in footer)
✅ Services page at /services shows detailed service info with 13+ services
✅ Services page has category filters: Всички, Довършителни работи, Инсталации, Груб строеж, Изолации
✅ Chat system at /messages loads correctly with conversations sidebar
✅ Chat allows sending messages - message input and send button working
✅ Chat contact filtering - phone numbers and emails are censored for unpaid companies (visible: [*** контактна информация скрита ***])
✅ Free lead claiming endpoint working (GET /api/leads/free-status returns 3 free leads for new companies)
✅ Calculator usage tracking (GET /api/calculator/status returns 5 free uses for new companies)
✅ PDF generation from calculator (POST /api/calculator/pdf returns valid PDF)
✅ Navigation links: 'Услуги' and 'Съобщения' visible when logged in
✅ Project detail page shows contact info when unlocked
✅ Send message button on project detail page ('Изпрати съобщение')
✅ Calculator shows 28 services with regional pricing (28 областi)
✅ PDF download button ('Изтегли PDF оферта') visible on calculator
seed_data_creation: New test company created during testing for free leads verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (chat with filtering, free leads, calculator tracking, PDF generation, services page) have been tested and are working. Test users: testclient@test.com and testcompany@test.com with password 'password123' are functional.

logo_display.details: Logo images at /logo-nav.png and /logo-footer.png returning HTTP 200

services_page.details: 13+ services with category filters, expandable details, time estimates, price ranges

chat_system.details: Messages page loads, conversations sidebar, send/receive messages working

contact_filtering.details: Phone/email filtered for unpaid companies, shows [*** контактна информация скрита ***]

free_leads.details: API returns 3 free leads for new companies, endpoint working

calculator_tracking.details: API returns 5 free uses for companies, log-use endpoint working

pdf_generation.details: POST /api/calculator/pdf returns valid PDF with Bulgarian content

navigation_links.details: Услуги and Съобщения links visible in navbar when logged in

project_detail.details: Contact info visible when unlocked, send message button present
